moments.title: World Cup Semi-Finals Kick Off
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 semi-finals begin this week, with France taking on Spain, and England facing Argentina for a place in the final.

angles.name: France vs Spain build-up
angles.copy: World Cup Semi-Finals are HERE! First up, it's France vs Spain in what promises to be an epic clash. Who are you backing?

angles.name: England vs Argentina hype
angles.copy: It's the one we've all been waiting for! England take on Argentina in the World Cup Semi-Finals on Wednesday. Can the Three Lions roar into the final?

moments.title: The Open Championship Begins
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, golf's final major of the year, tees off from Thursday at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England.

angles.name: Major golf starts
angles.copy: It's Major Championship week! The Open gets underway from Thursday at Royal Birkdale. Who's lifting the Claret Jug this year?

angles.name: Local favourite angle (if applicable)
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale is ready! Keep an eye on local favourite Tommy Fleetwood as The Open Championship begins in Southport this Thursday. Could it be his year?

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean UK No.1
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' holds the UK Singles Chart No. 1 spot for a 16th nonconsecutive week, a new record for a song not hitting the US Top 10.

angles.name: Chart record broken
angles.copy: History made! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is Number 1 for a staggering 16th week on the UK Singles Chart. What a run!

angles.name: Longest running No.1
angles.copy: Still at the top! 'Rein Me In' by Sam Fender & Olivia Dean continues its incredible reign on the UK Singles Chart. Are you still listening?

moments.title: System Of A Down in London
moments.blurb: System Of A Down play their first London show in over a decade tonight, with a second date on Wednesday.

angles.name: SOAD live tonight
angles.copy: System Of A Down are back in London tonight for their first show in over 10 years! Who's heading to Wembley?

angles.name: Rock legends return
angles.copy: Rock legends System Of A Down hit London for two massive shows this week! Expect a huge comeback.

moments.title: Bruno Mars London Residency
moments.blurb: Bruno Mars kicks off a five-night London residency this Friday, marking his first UK shows in eight years.

angles.name: Bruno Mars is back
angles.copy: He's back! Bruno Mars starts his five-night London residency this Friday. Get ready for some 24K Magic!

angles.name: Big weekend gigs
angles.copy: London is heating up! Bruno Mars brings his incredible live show to the capital for multiple dates starting this weekend.

moments.title: F1 Belgian Grand Prix
moments.blurb: Formula 1 heads to Spa-Francorchamps this weekend for the Belgian Grand Prix, running from July 17-19.

angles.name: F1 weekend
angles.copy: Start your engines! It's Grand Prix weekend, with F1 heading to the iconic Spa-Francorchamps for the Belgian GP. Who's taking the win?

angles.name: Spa-Francorchamps challenge
angles.copy: The ultimate test for drivers and cars! The Belgian Grand Prix at Spa-Francorchamps is almost here. Get ready for high-speed drama.

moments.title: Roger McGuinn is 84
moments.blurb: Roger McGuinn, co-founder of The Byrds and pioneer of folk-rock, turns 84 today.

angles.name: Byrds legend's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 84th to the legendary Roger McGuinn of The Byrds! His distinctive Rickenbacker sound defined an era. What's your favourite Byrds track?

moments.title: Deborah Cox is 52
moments.blurb: Canadian R&B singer Deborah Cox, known for hits like 'Nobody's Supposed to Be Here', celebrates her 52nd birthday today.

angles.name: R&B diva's birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 52nd birthday to the incredible R&B powerhouse Deborah Cox! Turn up 'Nobody's Supposed to Be Here' today.

moments.title: Linda Ronstadt is 80
moments.blurb: The iconic singer Linda Ronstadt, known for her versatile voice and genre-spanning career, celebrates her 80th birthday on Wednesday. (Note: No direct citation for Ronstadt's birthday on July 15, but it's a widely known fact. Will use general birthday source from previous searches if I cannot find a specific one for 2026. Famous Birthdays lists her as July 15, 1946).

angles.name: Music legend's milestone
angles.copy: A very happy 80th birthday to the legendary Linda Ronstadt on Wednesday! What an incredible career and voice. What's your favourite song?

moments.title: Stewart Copeland is 74
moments.blurb: Stewart Copeland, the dynamic drummer and founder of The Police, turns 74 this Thursday. (Note: No direct citation for Copeland's birthday on July 16, but it's a widely known fact. Famous Birthdays lists him as July 16, 1952).

angles.name: Police drummer's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 74th birthday to the incredible Stewart Copeland of The Police on Thursday! What a powerhouse behind the kit. What's your favourite Police track?

moments.title: Brian May is 79
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday this Saturday. (Note: No direct citation for May's birthday on July 19, but it's a widely known fact. Famous Birthdays lists him as July 19, 1947).

angles.name: Queen's guitar hero
angles.copy: A huge happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May from Queen this Saturday! What an absolute guitar legend.

moments.title: Summer School Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: Schools across the UK are starting to break up for the summer holidays this week, with many closing their doors from July 20th and 23rd.

angles.name: School's out for summer
angles.copy: The summer holidays are officially beginning for many schools across the UK this week! Sun's out, fun's out!

angles.name: What are your plans?
angles.copy: No more school runs for a while! Many schools are breaking up this week. What exciting plans do you have for the summer?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Next Week
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk next week, running from July 23-26, celebrating its 20th anniversary.

angles.name: Festival countdown
angles.copy: The countdown is on for Latitude Festival! Celebrating 20 years, it kicks off next week in Suffolk. Who's got their tickets?

angles.name: Suffolk's big weekend
angles.copy: Henham Park is getting ready! Latitude Festival brings music, comedy, and arts to Suffolk from July 23-26. It's going to be huge!

moments.title: Ann Droid on BBC
moments.blurb: Diane Morgan's new comedy series, 'Ann Droid', where she stars as a robot companion, is airing on BBC One and BBC iPlayer this July.

angles.name: New comedy to watch
angles.copy: Diane Morgan as a robot? Yes please! Her new comedy 'Ann Droid' is on BBC One and iPlayer this month. Have you watched it yet?

moments.title: Little House on the Prairie Reboot
moments.blurb: A new adaptation of 'Little House on the Prairie' premiered on Netflix on July 9, bringing the classic stories to a new generation.

angles.name: Nostalgic TV reboot
angles.copy: 'Little House on the Prairie' is back! The new adaptation landed on Netflix last week. Are you tuning in for some classic storytelling?
